name: SAGE: Systematic Automated Guided Exploration for Text-to-SQL Vulnerability Discovery
content: While Large Language Models (LLMs) have achieved remarkable success in Text-to-SQL tasks, their deployment in real-world environments is hindered by latent reliability issues. Identifying these latent weaknesses is critical for building trustworthy database interfaces, yet current diagnostic approaches rely heavily on static, expert-defined rules, which lack the capability for systematic and automated exploration. To bridge this gap, we propose SAGE (Systematic Automated Guided Exploration), a n
summary: SAGE 提出了一种新的框架，用于自主发现基于LLM的Text-to-SQL生成中的潜在失败模式。通过不断更新的漏洞代码库设计有针对性的扰动，并迭代验证和记录潜在缺陷，显著提高了对现有模型脆弱性的认识。
key_insights: SAGE 能够系统化和自动化地探索LLM在文本到SQL任务中的潜在问题，解决了当前诊断方法依赖静态、专家定义规则的问题。
实验表明，SAGE能够揭示大量失败案例，突显了当前模型的脆弱性。
漏洞代码库具有跨模型转移性，表明发现的模式代表了一般性的结构弱点。
xihe_relevance: SAGE 的方法可以应用于自反层或进化引擎等曦和相关领域，以提高数据库接口的信任度。
